name: Amalgamated Financial Corp.
summary: General Overview Amalgamated Financial Corp., a Delaware public benefit corporation ("we" or the "Company"), was formed on August 25, 2020 to serve as the holding company for Amalgamated Bank (the "Bank") and is a bank holding company registered with the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve under the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956, as amended. On March 1, 2021 (the Effective Date), the Company acquired all of the outstanding stock of Amalgamated Bank, a New York state-chartered commercial...
